title: rhacoma latifolia
intro: Rhacoma latifolia, also known as Dhaan, is a type of plant that belongs to the lamiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rhacoma latifolia include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and improving digestion. Rhacoma latifolia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
